basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Junior Library Professional Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 April 2026 on the official website https://iimk.ac.in/ . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Essential: Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class. Candidates must have completed their MLISc degree within the last three years (2022, 2023, or 2024). Strong proficiency in English communication. Minimum one to two years of relevant post-qualification experience in a reputed institute (IIM, IIT, NIT, IISER, etc.). Desirable: Bachelor’s degree in Commerce/Management (preferred). Qualification in UGC-NET / CSIR-NET / SLET / SET or equivalent. At least one research paper published in a reputed national/international journal or conference proceedings. Working knowledge of KOHA or any Integrated Library Management System (ILMS).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the JUNIOR LIBRARY PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANT position at IIM Kozhikode is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) degree with First Class from a recognized university. The degree should have been completed within the last three years (2022, 2023, or 2024).

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for the JUNIOR LIBRARY PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANT role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of one to two years of relevant post-qualification experience in a reputed institute such as IIM, IIT, NIT, or IISER is required for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the JUNIOR LIBRARY PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANT post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the JUNIOR LIBRARY PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANT post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the JUNIOR LIBRARY PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANT position announced by IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a skill test, a presentation, and a personal interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply online through the official website of IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIM Kozhikode offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
